description: Planned licenses to ingest. When an entry appears in licenses/index.json, scripts/aggregate-index.mjs removes it from this list automatically. Update this file to add new work; do not hand-edit to mark things done.

planned.name: GNU Free Documentation License 1.2 only
planned.rationale: Pre-Wikipedia relicensing GFDL. Still attached to many older docs.

planned.name: UK Open Government Licence 3.0
planned.rationale: Covers effectively all UK government data and works.

planned.name: Ubuntu Font Licence 1.0
planned.rationale: Canonical's font license; governs Ubuntu and several derivative fonts.
